homepage.heroSubline: Reliable plumbing solutions across the Valley. From leaky faucets to complete system overhauls, we've got you covered.
homepage.aboutTitle: Decades of Trustworthy Plumbing in Phoenix
aboutText: Alexander's Plumbing started with a simple mission: provide honest, reliable plumbing services to our Phoenix neighbors. We're a family-owned business, born and raised right here in the Valley, and we understand the unique plumbing challenges our desert climate presents.

Our approach is straightforward: diagnose accurately, communicate clearly, and execute flawlessly. We believe in doing the job right the first time, using quality materials and proven techniques to ensure lasting results. No shortcuts, no surprises – just dependable plumbing you can count on.

We're committed to giving back to the community that has supported us for over a decade. We actively participate in local initiatives and offer discounts to seniors and veterans. We're not just plumbers; we're your neighbors, dedicated to keeping Phoenix flowing.

valueProps.title: Rapid Response
valueProps.description: 24/7 emergency service to tackle urgent leaks, burst pipes, and other plumbing disasters.

valueProps.title: Upfront Pricing
valueProps.description: Honest, transparent quotes with no hidden fees. You'll know exactly what to expect before we start any work.

valueProps.title: Experienced Technicians
valueProps.description: Our team is comprised of licensed, skilled plumbers with years of experience in Phoenix's unique environment.

valueProps.title: Quality Guarantee
valueProps.description: We stand behind our work with a comprehensive guarantee, ensuring your complete satisfaction.

homepage.ctaSubline: Call Alexander's Plumbing for fast, reliable service across Phoenix and the surrounding areas.

services.name: Leak Detection & Repair
services.shortDescription: Expert leak detection and repair services to protect your Phoenix home from water damage.
services.description: Water leaks can cause significant damage to Phoenix homes, especially with our expansive soil. Alexander's Plumbing uses advanced leak detection technology to pinpoint the source of leaks, even hidden ones behind walls or under slabs. We handle everything from minor faucet drips to major pipe bursts, minimizing water waste and preventing costly structural repairs. Our team is experienced in repairing all types of plumbing systems found in Valley homes, from older copper pipes to modern PEX. We'll assess the damage, provide a clear explanation of the problem, and offer effective, lasting solutions. Don't let a small leak turn into a major headache – call us for fast, reliable leak detection and repair services.
process: Step 1: Comprehensive inspection using specialized equipment to locate the source of the leak.
Step 2: Detailed explanation of the problem and available repair options.
Step 3: Efficient and professional repair using quality materials.
Step 4: Thorough testing to ensure the leak is completely resolved.
benefits: Prevents water damage and mold growth.
Extends the lifespan of your plumbing system.

faq.question: How do I know if I have a hidden leak?
faq.answer: Signs of a hidden leak include unexplained increases in your water bill, the sound of running water when no fixtures are in use, and damp spots on walls or floors. If you suspect a leak, call us for a professional inspection.

faq.question: What types of leaks can you detect?
faq.answer: We can detect all types of leaks, including slab leaks, pipe leaks, faucet leaks, and toilet leaks. Our advanced equipment allows us to locate even the most difficult-to-find leaks.

faq.question: How quickly can you respond to a leak?
faq.answer: We offer 24/7 emergency service for urgent leaks. We understand the importance of acting quickly to minimize water damage, and we'll dispatch a technician to your home as soon as possible.

services.name: Water Heater Services
services.shortDescription: Reliable water heater repair, replacement, and maintenance for Phoenix homes.
services.description: A functioning water heater is essential for comfortable living in Phoenix, especially during the cooler months. Alexander's Plumbing provides comprehensive water heater services, including repair, replacement, and maintenance. Whether you have a traditional tank water heater or a tankless system, our experienced technicians can diagnose and resolve any issue. We work with all major brands and models, and we're committed to providing efficient, cost-effective solutions. From fixing a pilot light to replacing a corroded tank, we'll ensure you have hot water when you need it. We also offer water heater maintenance services to extend the lifespan of your unit and prevent unexpected breakdowns, vital in the harsh Phoenix climate.
process: Step 1: Thorough inspection of your water heater to identify the problem.
Step 2: Clear explanation of the repair or replacement options.
Step 3: Professional installation or repair using quality parts.
Step 4: Testing to ensure proper operation and safety.
benefits: Ensures a consistent supply of hot water.
Extends the lifespan of your water heater.

faq.question: How long does a water heater typically last in Phoenix?
faq.answer: The lifespan of a water heater in Phoenix can vary depending on water quality and maintenance, but typically ranges from 8-12 years. Regular maintenance can help extend its lifespan.

faq.question: What are the signs that my water heater needs to be replaced?
faq.answer: Signs of a failing water heater include rusty water, strange noises, leaks, and inconsistent water temperature. If you notice any of these issues, call us for an inspection.

faq.question: Do you offer tankless water heater installation?
faq.answer: Yes, we offer tankless water heater installation. Tankless water heaters are a great option for saving energy and space, providing hot water on demand.

services.name: Drain Cleaning
services.shortDescription: Fast and effective drain cleaning services to clear clogged drains and prevent backups.
services.description: Clogged drains are a common problem in Phoenix homes, often caused by hair, grease, and mineral buildup from our hard water. Alexander's Plumbing offers fast and effective drain cleaning services to clear clogged drains and prevent future backups. We use a variety of techniques, including drain snaking and hydro jetting, to remove stubborn clogs and restore proper drainage. Our experienced technicians can handle any type of drain clog, from kitchen sinks to main sewer lines. We'll diagnose the cause of the clog and recommend the best solution to keep your drains flowing smoothly. Don't let a clogged drain disrupt your daily routine – call us for prompt and reliable drain cleaning services.
process: Step 1: Assessment of the clogged drain to determine the cause and location of the blockage.
Step 2: Selection of the appropriate drain cleaning method (e.g., snaking or hydro jetting).
Step 3: Removal of the clog and restoration of proper drainage.
Step 4: Inspection of the drain to ensure it is clear and functioning properly.
benefits: Extends the lifespan of your plumbing system.

faq.question: What causes clogged drains?
faq.answer: Clogged drains are typically caused by hair, grease, food particles, soap scum, and mineral buildup. In Phoenix, hard water can contribute to mineral buildup in drains.

faq.question: What is hydro jetting?
faq.answer: Hydro jetting is a drain cleaning method that uses high-pressure water to blast away stubborn clogs and buildup from drain pipes. It's an effective solution for removing grease, roots, and other debris.

faq.question: How often should I have my drains cleaned?
faq.answer: The frequency of drain cleaning depends on your usage and the age of your plumbing system. We recommend having your drains cleaned at least once a year to prevent backups and maintain proper drainage.

services.name: Sewer Line Services
services.shortDescription: Expert sewer line repair, replacement, and inspection services for Phoenix properties.
services.description: Sewer line problems can be a major headache for Phoenix homeowners, leading to backups, foul odors, and potential property damage. Alexander's Plumbing offers comprehensive sewer line services, including repair, replacement, and inspection. We use advanced techniques, such as video camera inspection, to diagnose the cause of sewer line problems and recommend the most effective solution. Whether you have a cracked pipe, root intrusion, or a collapsed sewer line, our experienced technicians can handle the job. We'll work quickly and efficiently to restore proper sewer function and minimize disruption to your property. We understand the importance of a functioning sewer line, and we're committed to providing reliable, long-lasting solutions.
process: Step 1: Video camera inspection to diagnose the condition of the sewer line.
Step 2: Recommendation of the appropriate repair or replacement method.
Step 3: Excavation (if necessary) and repair or replacement of the damaged sewer line.
Step 4: Backfilling and restoration of the property.
benefits: Prevents sewer backups and property damage.

faq.question: What are the signs of a sewer line problem?
faq.answer: Signs of a sewer line problem include frequent drain backups, slow-draining fixtures, foul odors in your yard, and a gurgling sound coming from your drains.

faq.question: What is video camera inspection?
faq.answer: Video camera inspection involves inserting a small camera into your sewer line to visually inspect its condition. This allows us to accurately diagnose the cause of sewer line problems without digging up your yard.

faq.question: How long does sewer line repair or replacement take?
faq.answer: The duration of sewer line repair or replacement depends on the extent of the damage and the complexity of the project. We'll provide you with a time estimate before starting any work.

services.name: Fixture Installation
services.shortDescription: Professional installation of faucets, sinks, toilets, showers, and other plumbing fixtures.
services.description: Upgrading your plumbing fixtures can enhance the look and functionality of your Phoenix home. Alexander's Plumbing offers professional installation of faucets, sinks, toilets, showers, and other plumbing fixtures. Whether you're remodeling your bathroom or simply replacing an old fixture, our experienced technicians can handle the job. We'll ensure that your new fixtures are installed correctly and efficiently, with proper connections and leak-free performance. We work with all major brands and styles, and we're committed to providing quality workmanship and exceptional customer service. From selecting the right fixtures to completing the installation, we'll guide you through the entire process.
process: Step 1: Removal of the old fixture.
Step 2: Preparation of the plumbing connections.
Step 3: Installation of the new fixture.
Step 4: Testing to ensure proper operation and leak-free performance.
benefits: Enhances the look and functionality of your home.

faq.question: Do you offer fixture selection assistance?
faq.answer: Yes, we can provide fixture selection assistance to help you choose the right fixtures for your needs and budget. We can offer recommendations based on style, functionality, and water efficiency.

faq.question: Do I need to purchase the fixtures myself?
faq.answer: You can either purchase the fixtures yourself or we can purchase them for you. We have relationships with local suppliers and can often get better pricing on fixtures.

faq.question: How long does fixture installation take?
faq.answer: The duration of fixture installation depends on the type of fixture and the complexity of the project. We'll provide you with a time estimate before starting any work.

services.name: Backflow Prevention
services.shortDescription: Protect your water supply with backflow prevention device installation and testing.
services.description: Backflow can contaminate your potable water supply, posing a serious health risk. Alexander's Plumbing provides backflow prevention device installation, testing, and repair services to protect your Phoenix home or business. We're certified backflow prevention specialists, and we understand the importance of proper backflow prevention. We'll install and test backflow prevention devices to ensure they are functioning correctly and preventing backflow. We also offer backflow prevention device repair services to address any issues and maintain the integrity of your water supply. Protect your family and your community – call us for reliable backflow prevention services.
process: Step 1: Assessment of your property to determine the need for backflow prevention.
Step 2: Installation of a backflow prevention device.
Step 3: Testing of the backflow prevention device to ensure proper operation.
Step 4: Annual testing and maintenance of the backflow prevention device.
benefits: Protects your water supply from contamination.
Ensures the safety of your drinking water.

faq.question: What is backflow?
faq.answer: Backflow is the reversal of water flow in a plumbing system, which can allow contaminants to enter your potable water supply.

faq.question: What is a backflow prevention device?
faq.answer: A backflow prevention device is a mechanical device that prevents backflow from occurring in a plumbing system.

faq.question: How often should I have my backflow prevention device tested?
faq.answer: Backflow prevention devices should be tested annually to ensure they are functioning correctly.

services.name: Emergency Plumbing Services
services.shortDescription: 24/7 emergency plumbing services for urgent plumbing problems in Phoenix.
services.description: Plumbing emergencies can happen at any time, day or night. Alexander's Plumbing offers 24/7 emergency plumbing services to address urgent plumbing problems in Phoenix. Whether you have a burst pipe, a sewer backup, or a major leak, our experienced technicians are available to respond quickly and resolve the issue. We understand the importance of acting fast to minimize damage and prevent further problems. We'll arrive promptly, assess the situation, and provide efficient, effective solutions. Don't hesitate to call us – we're here to help you through any plumbing emergency.
process: Step 1: Immediate response to your emergency plumbing call.
Step 2: Prompt arrival at your property.
Step 3: Assessment of the plumbing problem.
Step 4: Efficient and effective repair to resolve the emergency.
benefits: Provides immediate relief from plumbing emergencies.
Minimizes water damage and property loss.

faq.question: What is considered a plumbing emergency?
faq.answer: A plumbing emergency is any plumbing problem that poses an immediate threat to your property or health, such as a burst pipe, a sewer backup, or a major leak.

faq.question: How quickly can you respond to a plumbing emergency?
faq.answer: We strive to respond to plumbing emergencies as quickly as possible. Our technicians are available 24/7 and will dispatch to your location promptly.

faq.question: What should I do while waiting for the plumber to arrive?
faq.answer: While waiting for the plumber to arrive, try to shut off the water supply to the affected area if possible. This can help minimize water damage. Also, clear the area around the plumbing problem to allow the plumber easy access.

serviceAreas.content:
Alexander's Plumbing is proud to serve the Scottsdale community, providing expert plumbing services to its diverse neighborhoods. From luxury Southwestern estates to charming desert homes, we understand the unique plumbing needs of Scottsdale residents. We are equipped to handle everything from routine maintenance to complex repairs, ensuring your plumbing system functions flawlessly year-round.

Scottsdale's extreme summer heat can put a strain on plumbing systems, leading to leaks, burst pipes, and other issues. Our experienced technicians are well-versed in addressing these challenges, offering preventative maintenance and prompt repairs to keep your plumbing in top condition. We also specialize in water heater services, ensuring you have a reliable source of hot water even during the hottest months.
serviceAreas.localContext: Scottsdale is known for its luxury Southwestern estates and experiences extreme summer heat, exceeding 110F.

reviews.name: Maria S.
reviews.text: Alexander's Plumbing replaced my old water heater with a new, energy-efficient model. The technician, David, was professional, knowledgeable, and efficient. He explained everything clearly and answered all my questions. The installation was smooth, and the price was fair. I highly recommend them!

reviews.name: Robert B.
reviews.text: I had a major sewer line issue that was causing backups in my Ahwatukee home. Alexander's Plumbing diagnosed the problem quickly using a camera inspection and provided a clear plan for repair. The crew was professional and courteous, and they completed the job with minimal disruption to my yard. The price was reasonable, and I'm happy with the results.

reviews.name: Jessica L.
reviews.text: Our kitchen sink was completely clogged, and we couldn't get it to drain. Alexander's Plumbing came out the same day and cleared the drain quickly and efficiently. The technician, Mark, was friendly and knowledgeable, and he gave us tips on how to prevent future clogs. Great service!

reviews.name: Kevin M.
reviews.text: I suspected I had a hidden leak in my bathroom, so I called Alexander's Plumbing. They used their advanced leak detection equipment to pinpoint the source of the leak behind the shower wall. They repaired the leak quickly and professionally, preventing further damage to my home. I'm very impressed with their expertise and service.

reviews.name: Susan K.
reviews.text: I recently remodeled my bathroom and needed a new faucet installed. Alexander's Plumbing did a great job installing the faucet. The plumber was on time, professional, and efficient. He made sure everything was working properly before he left. I'm very happy with the results.

reviews.name: Michael P.
reviews.text: My toilet was constantly running, wasting water and driving me crazy. Alexander's Plumbing came out and quickly diagnosed the problem. They replaced the faulty parts and now the toilet works perfectly. The service was fast, efficient, and affordable. I highly recommend them for any plumbing needs.
